title: Bank boss sorry after describing workers as ‘lower value human capital’
description: LONDON  -  The boss of Standard Chartered has apologised after describing employees whose jobs are vulnerable to being replaced by artificial intelligence (AI)
content: LONDON - The boss of Standard Chartered has apologised after describing employees whose jobs are vulnerable to being replaced by artificial intelligence (AI) as “lower value human capital”. Discussing how automation was likely to lead to thousands of... [2734 chars]

title: Startup raises US$1.3bil for an AI ‘grid’
description: As tech giants dominate the hardware needed to build artificial intelligence, Amp hopes to create an alternative.
content:

title: Takaichi considering new quota for growth investment
description: The plan would cover 17 growth areas, including artificial intelligence and semiconductors, to support long-term corporate investments.
content:
Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi has unveiled a plan to set up a new investment quota for 17 growth areas, including artificial intelligence and semiconductors, to support long-term corporate investments.

title: Silicon Valley to get its first two-year degree focused on AI
description: De Anza College's new Associate in Science degree in Applied Artificial Intelligence will be available this fall, along with six new AI-focused credentials and more than 20 additional new degree and certificate programs, the school announced this week.

title: Bill regulating powerful AI models advances as advocates say it’s only the first step
description: From Capitol News Illinois: The Illinois Senate voted overwhelmingly on Thursday to advance a bill that would regulate how large artificial intelligence model developers handle transparency and catastrophic risk
content:

title: Trump had ‘many’ concerns about AI draft policy order
description: The artificial intelligence order pulled Thursday could still be rewritten.
content:
